intended_use: brAIn™ Shoulder Positioning is intended to be used as an information tool to assist in the preoperative surgical planning and visualization of a primary total shoulder replacement.
intended_use_full: brAIn™ Shoulder Positioning is intended to be used as an information tool to assist in the preoperative surgical planning and visualization of a primary total shoulder replacement.
target_condition: Primary total shoulder replacement (anatomical and reverse)
ground_truth: For segmentation: manual segmentation performed by medical professionals; For shoulder side detection: manual assessment by Clinical Solutions Specialist; For landmark validation: expert positioning
other_metrics: Segmentation: mean Dice Similarity Coefficient (DSC) ≥0.95; Measurement Accuracy: 1° for angle measurement, 1 mm for distance measurement, 1% for 3D subluxation; Landmark Performance: 3 mm mean distance; Ruler tool precision: 1 mm
